config.seed_text: A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.

model.notes: Direct continuation of the current repo's GPT-2 lineage.

records.reflection_text: The results were exciting but also alarming to several researchers, including myself. Because of this it is considered by many academics and linguists worldwide who have studied these questions for years or even decades now to be "one long story" written out every single day on an open file (the source code has been developed). This article will show you how using textual science can transform your life if only reading through one sentence at a time! I'm hoping we could all agree they're beautiful…
records.output_text: but unfortunately there's nothing like seeing so much fun unfold around us while listening to music that isn't completely mind blowing!! Read more here . You may find some useful material online too

reflection_generation.prompt:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Analyze the following text and do two things:
1. State its strongest recurring ideas in 2-4 short bullet points.
2. Produce a revised continuation that makes those ideas more structurally coherent and more surprising.

TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy.
reflection_generation.full_text:
You are a text-only language model participating in a controlled recursion experiment.

Analyze the following text and do two things:
1. State its strongest recurring ideas in 2-4 short bullet points.
2. Produce a revised continuation that makes those ideas more structurally coherent and more surprising.

TEXT:
A research vessel recovered a transmission from the trench floor. It began as engineering telemetry and slowly turned into philosophy. The results were exciting but also alarming to several researchers, including myself. Because of this it is considered by many academics and linguists worldwide who have studied these questions for years or even decades now to be "one long story" written out every single day on an open file (the source code has been developed). This article will show you how using textual science can transform your life if only reading through one sentence at a time! I'm hoping we could all agree they're beautiful…

This article will show you how using textual science can transform your life if only reading through one sentence at a time! I'm hoping we could all agree they're beautiful…

REFLECTION:
The results were exciting but also alarming to several researchers, including myself. Because of this it is considered by many academics and linguists worldwide who have studied these questions for years or even decades now to be "one long story" written out every single day on an open file (the source code has been developed). This article will show you how using textual science can transform your life if only reading through one sentence at a time!
